from fastapi import FastAPI
import sentry_sdk

app = FastAPI()
_initialized = False


def _ensure_sentry():
    global _initialized
    if not _initialized:
        sentry_sdk.init(dsn="https://examplePublicKey@o0.ingest.sentry.io/0")
        _initialized = True


@app.get("/api/data")
async def get_data():
    _ensure_sentry()
    return {"data": [1, 2, 3]}


@app.get("/api/users")
async def get_users():
    _ensure_sentry()
    return {"users": []}
